title: aptx conformance projection
description: The normalized subset of each implementation's JSON output that is compared across implementations and against baselines. All implementations must produce exactly this shape.

action.description: The CLI action that was invoked.

sender_address.description: Sender address normalized to full 64-hex-char form with 0x prefix.

abi_enabled.description: Whether ABI resolution was enabled for this transaction.

success.description: Whether the transaction succeeded (in simulate/dry-run mode this is always true for mock).

vm_status.description: The VM status string returned by the node or mock.

gas_used.description: Gas units used (mock returns a fixed value; real network returns the actual value).
